AcceptAgreementApprovalRequest.name: AcceptAgreementApprovalRequest
AcceptAgreementApprovalRequest.description: Grants permission to approve an incoming subscription request (for providers who provide products that require subscription verification)

AcceptAgreementCancellationRequest.name: AcceptAgreementCancellationRequest
AcceptAgreementCancellationRequest.description: Grants permission to accept an agreement cancellation request

AcceptAgreementPaymentRequest.name: AcceptAgreementPaymentRequest
AcceptAgreementPaymentRequest.description: Grants permission to accept a payment request

AcceptAgreementRequest.name: AcceptAgreementRequest
AcceptAgreementRequest.description: Grants permission to accept an agreement request

AssociateProductsWithPrivateMarketplace.name: AssociateProductsWithPrivateMarketplace
AssociateProductsWithPrivateMarketplace.description: Grants permission to approve a request for a product to be associated with the Private Marketplace. This action can be performed by any account in an AWS Organization, provided the user has permissions to do so, and the Organization's Service Control Policies allow it

BatchCreateBillingAdjustmentRequest.name: BatchCreateBillingAdjustmentRequest
BatchCreateBillingAdjustmentRequest.description: Grants permission to create a billing adjustment request against an agreement

BatchMeterUsage.name: BatchMeterUsage
BatchMeterUsage.description: Grants permission to post metering records for a set of customers for SaaS applications

CancelAgreementCancellationRequest.name: CancelAgreementCancellationRequest
CancelAgreementCancellationRequest.description: Grants permission to cancel a pending agreement cancellation request

CancelAgreementPaymentRequest.name: CancelAgreementPaymentRequest
CancelAgreementPaymentRequest.description: Grants permission to cancel a payment request

CancelAgreementRequest.name: CancelAgreementRequest
CancelAgreementRequest.description: Grants permission to cancel pending subscription requests for products that require subscription verification

CancelChangeSet.name: CancelChangeSet
CancelChangeSet.description: Grants permission to cancel a running change set

CreateAgreementRequest.name: CreateAgreementRequest
CreateAgreementRequest.description: Grants permission to create an agreement request

CreatePrivateMarketplaceRequests.name: CreatePrivateMarketplaceRequests
CreatePrivateMarketplaceRequests.description: Grants permission to create a new request for a product or products to be associated with the Private Marketplace. This action can be performed by any account in an in an AWS Organization, provided the user has permissions to do so, and the Organization's Service Control Policies allow it

DeleteResourcePolicy.name: DeleteResourcePolicy
DeleteResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to delete the resource policy of an existing entity

DescribeAgreement.name: DescribeAgreement
DescribeAgreement.description: Grants permission to describe the metadata about the agreement

DescribeAssessment.name: DescribeAssessment
DescribeAssessment.description: Grants permission to return the details of an existing assessment

DescribeBuilds.name: DescribeBuilds
DescribeBuilds.description: Describes Image Builds identified by a build Id

DescribeChangeSet.name: DescribeChangeSet
DescribeChangeSet.description: Grants permission to return the details of an existing change set

DescribeEntity.name: DescribeEntity
DescribeEntity.description: Grants permission to return the details of an existing entity

DescribePrivateMarketplaceRequests.name: DescribePrivateMarketplaceRequests
DescribePrivateMarketplaceRequests.description: Grants permission to describe requests and associated products in the Private Marketplace. This action can be performed by any account in an AWS Organization, provided the user has permissions to do so, and the Organization's Service Control Policies allow it

DescribeProcurementSystemConfiguration.name: DescribeProcurementSystemConfiguration
DescribeProcurementSystemConfiguration.description: Grants permission to describe the Procurement System integration configuration (e.g. Coupa) for the individual account, or for the entire AWS Organization if one exists. This action can only be performed by the master account if using an AWS Organization

DisassociateProductsFromPrivateMarketpla.name: DisassociateProductsFromPrivateMarketplace
DisassociateProductsFromPrivateMarketpla.description: Grants permission to decline a request for a product to be associated with the Private Marketplace. This action can be performed by any account in an AWS Organization, provided the user has permissions to do so, and the Organization's Service Control Policies allow it

GetAgreementApprovalRequest.name: GetAgreementApprovalRequest
GetAgreementApprovalRequest.description: Grants permission to view the details of incoming subscription requests (for providers who provide products that require subscription verification)

GetAgreementCancellationRequest.name: GetAgreementCancellationRequest
GetAgreementCancellationRequest.description: Grants permission to view the details of an agreement cancellation request

GetAgreementEntitlements.name: GetAgreementEntitlements
GetAgreementEntitlements.description: Grants permission to get the entitlements associated with an agreement

GetAgreementPaymentRequest.name: GetAgreementPaymentRequest
GetAgreementPaymentRequest.description: Grants permission to view details for a payment request

GetAgreementRequest.name: GetAgreementRequest
GetAgreementRequest.description: Grants permission to view the details of subscription requests for data products that require subscription verification

GetAgreementTerms.name: GetAgreementTerms
GetAgreementTerms.description: Grants permission to get a list of terms for an agreement

GetBillingAdjustmentRequest.name: GetBillingAdjustmentRequest
GetBillingAdjustmentRequest.description: Grants permission to view the details of a billing adjustment request

GetBuyerDashboard.name: GetBuyerDashboard
GetBuyerDashboard.description: Grants permission to view a dashboard that shows a buyer's AWS Marketplace purchase data

GetEntitlements.name: GetEntitlements
GetEntitlements.description: Grants permission to retrieve entitlement values for a given product. The results can be filtered based on customer identifier or product dimensions

GetInvoiceSubmissionTask.name: GetInvoiceSubmissionTask
GetInvoiceSubmissionTask.description: Grants permission to retrieve details of an existing invoice submission task

GetIssuedTaxInvoice.name: GetIssuedTaxInvoice
GetIssuedTaxInvoice.description: Grants permission to retrieve details of a specific tax invoice issued by AWS on behalf of a seller

GetListing.name: GetListing
GetListing.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about a listing

GetOffer.name: GetOffer
GetOffer.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about an offer

GetOfferSet.name: GetOfferSet
GetOfferSet.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about an offer set

GetOfferTerms.name: GetOfferTerms
GetOfferTerms.description: Grants permission to retrieve terms for an offer

GetProduct.name: GetProduct
GetProduct.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about a product

GetResourcePolicy.name: GetResourcePolicy
GetResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to get the resource policy of an existing entity

GetSellerDashboard.name: GetSellerDashboard
GetSellerDashboard.description: Grants permission to view a seller dashboard

ListAgreementApprovalRequests.name: ListAgreementApprovalRequests
ListAgreementApprovalRequests.description: Grants permission to list incoming subscription requests (for providers who provide products that require subscription verification)

ListAgreementCancellationRequests.name: ListAgreementCancellationRequests
ListAgreementCancellationRequests.description: Grants permission to list agreement cancellation requests

ListAgreementCharges.name: ListAgreementCharges
ListAgreementCharges.description: Grants permission to list charges associated with an agreement

ListAgreementInvoiceLineItems.name: ListAgreementInvoiceLineItems
ListAgreementInvoiceLineItems.description: Grants permission to list invoice line items for an agreement

ListAgreementPaymentRequests.name: ListAgreementPaymentRequests
ListAgreementPaymentRequests.description: Grants permission to list payment requests for an agreement

ListAgreementRequests.name: ListAgreementRequests
ListAgreementRequests.description: Grants permission to list subscription requests for products that require subscription verification

ListAssessments.name: ListAssessments
ListAssessments.description: Grants permission to list existing assessments

ListBillingAdjustmentRequests.name: ListBillingAdjustmentRequests
ListBillingAdjustmentRequests.description: Grants permission to list billing adjustment requests

ListChangeSets.name: ListChangeSets
ListChangeSets.description: Grants permission to list existing change sets

ListEntities.name: ListEntities
ListEntities.description: Grants permission to list existing entities

ListEntitlementDetails.name: ListEntitlementDetails
ListEntitlementDetails.description: Grants permission to list details of the entitlements associated with an agreement. Note that this action is not applicable to Marketplace purchases

ListFulfillmentOptions.name: ListFulfillmentOptions
ListFulfillmentOptions.description: Grants permission to list fulfillment options for a product

ListInvoiceSubmissionTasks.name: ListInvoiceSubmissionTasks
ListInvoiceSubmissionTasks.description: Grants permission to list existing invoice submission tasks

ListIssuedTaxInvoices.name: ListIssuedTaxInvoices
ListIssuedTaxInvoices.description: Grants permission to list tax invoices issued by AWS on behalf of a seller

ListPayables.name: ListPayables
ListPayables.description: Grants permission to list payables of the specified payable provenance

ListPrivateListings.name: ListPrivateListings
ListPrivateListings.description: Grants permission to list private offers

ListPrivateMarketplaceRequests.name: ListPrivateMarketplaceRequests
ListPrivateMarketplaceRequests.description: Grants permission to get a queryable list for requests and associated products in the Private Marketplace. This action can be performed by any account in an AWS Organization, provided the user has permissions to do so, and the Organization's Service Control Policies allow it

ListPurchaseOptions.name: ListPurchaseOptions
ListPurchaseOptions.description: Grants permission to list purchase options available to the buyer

ListTagsForResource.name: ListTagsForResource
ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a deployment parameter resource

MeterUsage.name: MeterUsage
MeterUsage.description: Grants permission to emit metering records

PutDeploymentParameter.name: PutDeploymentParameter
PutDeploymentParameter.description: Grants permission to create or update a deployment parameter resource

PutProcurementSystemConfiguration.name: PutProcurementSystemConfiguration
PutProcurementSystemConfiguration.description: Grants permission to create or update the Procurement System integration configuration (e.g. Coupa) for the individual account, or for the entire AWS Organization if one exists. This action can only be performed by the master account if using an AWS Organization

PutResourcePolicy.name: PutResourcePolicy
PutResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to attach a resource policy to an existing entity

RegisterUsage.name: RegisterUsage
RegisterUsage.description: Grants permission to to verify that the customer running your paid software is subscribed to your product on AWS Marketplace, enabling you to guard against unauthorized use. Meters software use per ECS task, per hour, with usage prorated to the second

RejectAgreementApprovalRequest.name: RejectAgreementApprovalRequest
RejectAgreementApprovalRequest.description: Grants permission to decline an incoming subscription requests (for providers who provide products that require subscription verification)

RejectAgreementCancellationRequest.name: RejectAgreementCancellationRequest
RejectAgreementCancellationRequest.description: Grants permission to reject an agreement cancellation request

RejectAgreementPaymentRequest.name: RejectAgreementPaymentRequest
RejectAgreementPaymentRequest.description: Grants permission to reject a payment request

ResolveCustomer.name: ResolveCustomer
ResolveCustomer.description: Grants permission to resolve a registration token to obtain a CustomerIdentifier and product code

SearchFacets.name: SearchFacets
SearchFacets.description: Grants permission to search for facet values to filter listings

SearchListings.name: SearchListings
SearchListings.description: Grants permission to search for product listings

SendAgreementCancellationRequest.name: SendAgreementCancellationRequest
SendAgreementCancellationRequest.description: Grants permission to send an agreement cancellation request

SendAgreementPaymentRequest.name: SendAgreementPaymentRequest
SendAgreementPaymentRequest.description: Grants permission to send a payment request

StartChangeSet.name: StartChangeSet
StartChangeSet.description: Grants permission to request a new change set (Note: resource-level permissions for this action and condition context keys for this action are only supported when used with Catalog API and are not supported when used with AWS Marketplace Management Portal)

StartInvoiceSubmissionTask.name: StartInvoiceSubmissionTask
StartInvoiceSubmissionTask.description: Grants permission to initiate tasks that submit invoices for processing in AWS Marketplace

Subscribe.name: Subscribe
Subscribe.description: Grants permission to subscribe to AWS Marketplace products. Includes the ability to send a subscription request for products that require subscription verification. Includes the ability to enable auto-renewal for an existing subscription

TagResource.name: TagResource
TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a deployment parameter resource

Unsubscribe.name: Unsubscribe
Unsubscribe.description: Grants permission to unsubscribe from AWS Marketplace products. Includes the ability to disable auto-renewal for an existing subscription

UntagResource.name: UntagResource
UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag a deployment parameter resource

UpdateAgreementApprovalRequest.name: UpdateAgreementApprovalRequest
UpdateAgreementApprovalRequest.description: Grants permission to make changes to an incoming subscription request, including the ability to delete the prospective subscriber's information (for providers who provide products that require subscription verification)

UpdatePurchaseOrders.name: UpdatePurchaseOrders
UpdatePurchaseOrders.description: Grants permission to update purchase orders for charges associated with an agreement

ViewSubscriptions.name: ViewSubscriptions
ViewSubscriptions.description: Grants permission to view account's subscriptions

aws-marketplace:AgreementType.name: aws-marketplace:AgreementType
aws-marketplace:AgreementType.description: Filters access by the type of the agreement

aws-marketplace:Intent.name: aws-marketplace:Intent
aws-marketplace:Intent.description: Filters access by the Intent parameter in the StartChangeSet request

aws-marketplace:PartyType.name: aws-marketplace:PartyType
aws-marketplace:PartyType.description: Filters access by the party type of the agreement

aws-marketplace:ProductId.name: aws-marketplace:ProductId
aws-marketplace:ProductId.description: Filters access by product id for AWS Marketplace purchases

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.name: aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}
aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.name: aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}
aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.name: aws:TagKeys
aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by tag keys that are passed in the request

catalog:ChangeType.name: catalog:ChangeType
catalog:ChangeType.description: Filters access by the change type in the StartChangeSet request
